name: Oktium
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "[Image: User-added image]"}]}, {"type": "h3", "children": [{"text": "This add-on was built by Oktium."}], "data-id": "this-add-on-was-built-by-oktium."}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://oktium.com/", "children": [{"text": "Visit add-on website!"}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For support with this add-on "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:support@oktium.com", "children": [{"text": "contact Oktium"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Overview"}], "data-id": "overview"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Oktium is an instant live video connection for online customers to real salespeople and service providers at brick-and-mortar locations. It adds a video call button to your website for customers to connect directly to you."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Benefits & Features"}], "data-id": "benefits--features"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "In-store like experience", "bold": true}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Connect with your customers, showcase your products, answer customers` questions and sell your products right during the Oktium video call."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Oktium call also enables contact information sharing, appointment scheduling and most importantly creating orders."}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Set up Oktium"}], "data-id": "set-up-oktium"}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Download Oktium 4B app from "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://apps.apple.com/us/app/oktium-for-business/id974934460", "children": [{"text": "AppStore"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "https://oktium.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/articles/360009406114-Business-profile-setup", "children": [{"text": "Register"}]}, {"text": " for an Oktium account."}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Oktium will contact you and implement the Face2 button to your Neto by Maropost store."}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "You can learn more about the Oktium platform "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://oktium.zendesk.com/hc/en-us/categories/201790985-Business", "children": [{"text": "here"}]}, {"text": "."}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "For enquiries or questions e-mail "}, {"type": "a", "url": "mailto:marketing@oktium.com", "children": [{"text": "Oktium"}]}, {"text": "."}]}]
